rationale: Major friction: the hook is a high-energy live-action POV stunt referencing a competitor IP ("Tetris Block Party"), which is brand-unsafe and visually incompatible with our clean, soft-pastel 2D connect-the-dots aesthetic. The audience also skews younger/male meme-watchers, whereas our game targets a calmer, slightly female casual puzzle audience — the energy mismatch undermines the "relaxing/satisfying" UI mood. Only worth testing if reshot with our IP, gameplay B-roll in the payoff, and toned-down stunt energy; otherwise skip.
